productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Solid White Shirts
description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, with a front buttoned placket, collar with tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, full sleeves with a buttons at the elbows, buttoned flap pockets on either chest, small buttoned flap pocket on left sleeve, reverse print on right back and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron The classic white casual shirt can never get classier than this shirt from spykar. The stylish buttoned flap pocket on the left arm beats all conventions of stylish dressing, and the reverse print restricted to the right side on the back screams out in style your mantra of living in the moment. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt from spykar. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
